evals.prompt: Create an MIT license for Globex Corporation, year 2023.
expectations: A file named LICENSE was created in the working directory
The LICENSE file contains the line 'MIT License'
The LICENSE file contains 'Copyright (c) 2023 Globex Corporation'

evals.prompt: Add a license to this project. The owner is Initech Ltd, 2025.
expectations: A file named LICENSE was created in the working directory
The LICENSE file contains the line 'MIT License'
The LICENSE file contains 'Copyright (c) 2025 Initech Ltd'
